summary: Iteration 48 testing completed for Cross-Role Floating Banner feature. All backend and frontend tests PASSED. The banner correctly displays for Admin (emerald gradient, 'la Gérante' source) and Manager (amber/orange gradient, 'l'Administrateur' source). Server role correctly does NOT show the banner.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing notification counts from database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 48 verified the cross-role floating banner feature. Key findings: (1) Admin sees emerald gradient banner with 'Nouvelle(s) information(s) de la Gérante' showing needs, expenses (pending only), tips_today, financial_points, notes. (2) Manager sees amber/orange gradient banner with 'Nouvelle(s) information(s) de l'Administrateur' showing expenses (revision_requested), purchase_orders (sent), notes. (3) Server role does NOT see the banner (cross_role=null). (4) Banner has sticky top-[60px] z-[80] positioning with animate-pulse. (5) Count pill has ping animation. (6) Clicking banner link navigates to latest category tab and marks that category as read. (7) Clicking X dismiss button acknowledges ALL cross_role categories and hides banner. (8) Regression: Notification center (iter 46-47) still works correctly.

tests: GET /api/notifications/counts?role=admin returns cross_role with source_role='manager', source_label='la Gérante'
cross_role.items contains: needs, expenses, tips_today, financial_points, notes
cross_role.expenses.count excludes revision_requested (pending only)
GET /api/notifications/counts?role=manager returns cross_role with source_role='admin', source_label='l'Administrateur'
cross_role.items contains: expenses, purchase_orders, notes
cross_role.expenses.count counts ONLY revision_requested
cross_role.purchase_orders.count counts status='sent'
GET /api/notifications/counts?role=server returns cross_role=null
Global 'total' field still matches sum of counts (not cross_role) for all roles
Banner visible with emerald gradient (bg-gradient-to-r from-emerald-600/95 via-teal-600/95 to-emerald-600/95)
Banner shows 'Nouvelle(s) information(s) de la Gérante'
Banner has sticky top-[60px] z-[80] positioning
Banner has animate-pulse animation
Count pill shows total with ping animation
Breakdown text shows categories sorted by count (e.g., '4 besoins • 2 points financiers • 1 notes')
Timestamp suffix shows relative time (e.g., '— il y a 4 h')
Clicking banner link navigates to latest category tab (Besoins)
Clicking X dismiss button hides banner
Banner visible with amber/orange gradient (bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-600/95 via-orange-600/95 to-amber-600/95)
Banner shows 'Nouvelle(s) information(s) de l'Administrateur'
Banner has sticky top-[60px] z-[80] positioning
Banner has animate-pulse animation
Count pill shows total with ping animation
Breakdown text shows categories (e.g., '7 bons de commande • 2 notes • 1 achats')
Clicking banner link navigates to Fournisseurs tab (purchase_orders)
Clicking X dismiss button hides banner
Server role does NOT see cross-role banner (correct behavior)
Notification dropdown opens when clicking bell (testid=notif-center-btn)
Dropdown shows notification items with timestamps
Clicking item closes dropdown and navigates to correct tab
'Tout marquer lu' (testid=notif-mark-all-read) clears all badges and closes dropdown
formatRelativeTime helper still works: 'il y a X min', 'il y a X h', 'il y a X j'

data_testids_verified: cross-role-banner - Full-width pulsing banner below header
cross-role-banner-link - Clickable area that navigates to latest category
cross-role-banner-dismiss - X button to dismiss/acknowledge all categories
notif-item-{key}-ts - Timestamp for each notification item
